description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the google/dart Docker image and a before_script that runs `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq ruby-full`, `ruby -v`, and `gem install sass`. Add a `pages` job in the `deploy` stage that only runs on the `master` branch. In that job execute the commands `echo "Getting dependencies"`, `pub get`, `echo "Building page"`, `pub build`, `echo "Setting proper base href"`, `dart tool/set_base_href.dart`, `echo "Moving build/web to public"`, `mv build/web public`, and `echo "Deploy to pages"`. Publish the `public/` directory as a pages artifact.
